_comment: Shared, NON-SECRET MCP server definitions — single source of truth for both Claude Code (~/.claude.json) and Claude Desktop. Secret env values (gitea/github/karakeep tokens) are injected at apply time from OpenBao by the merge scripts; outline is added per-app (http for Code, mcp-remote bridge for Desktop). signal is a thin JSON-RPC client for the signal-cli daemon (LaunchAgent rocks.stump.signal-daemon, tcp 127.0.0.1:7583) — the daemon owns the account/data dir, so no signal-cli/XDG_DATA_HOME is needed here. Edit here, then chezmoi apply.
